Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Redmoon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei mentions Redmoon as something she might not need.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon is a Herald and a leader of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Redmoon is the leader of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Redmoon is an entity that monitors situations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon is a Herald and the Blood Shadow that the Sage of Red Faith's relationship will become.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon used a script on a control panel to broadcast the conversation between him and the Sage of Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon is a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon has a milk-white line traveling through his cheek.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Redmoon is a group or entity that can rule and has been in contact with the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Redmoon has a blood Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Redmoon has pink skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Redmoon was a spirit that grew his own human body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Redmoon was a dried-up husk that looked like a corpse after a hundred years at the bottom of a desert.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is a Redmoon artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Redmoon has a red-robed entourage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
